name: Kurt Timothy Aston Valdecanas

projects.title: Kove
projects.description: An animated Next.js portfolio with a Groq chat widget trained on specialized parameters based on user specification

achievements: Designed and optimized mutliple business report automations for the Philippine Orthopedic Center using DevExpress and C# to improve data visualization and operational efficiency.
Built and maintained report functionalities with proactive quality checks, identifying repetitive manual processes and streamlining them through reusable report components.
Practiced version control (Git) and cross-functional collaboration with business teams to translate operational requirements into technical solutions.
